# cmccloudv2_image (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "cmccloudv2_image" "image1" {
    volume_id   = "a4621162-839e-4d06-be8c-93ccd39d7ed7"
    name        = "image-os-ubuntu"
    disk_format = "raw"
    force       = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the image
- `volume_id` (String) The id of volume that you want to create from

### Optional

- `disk_format` (String) The type of disk format
- `force` (Boolean) Set true if force create image
- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `created` (String) Created time
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `status` (String) OpenSearch status

<a id="nestedblock--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `create` (String)
- `delete` (String)
